footer.tagline: Zero tracking · Pure frontend · MIT License ·
footer.disclaimer: Exchange rates and pricing are for reference only; actual platform charges prevail

glossary.title: Glossary
glossary.explanation: Why compute the final effective rate? — The group rate shown by the platform is amplified or reduced by the recharge ratio (FX markup). Only after converting it to a 1:1 equivalent rate can it be compared directly with official pricing to judge whether it is a good deal.

rechargeAmount.desc: The actual CNY amount you spend

arrivedAmount.desc: The USD balance received after recharging

groupRate.desc: Billing multiplier the platform sets for a model group; lower means less is charged

rechargeRatio.desc: Recharge ÷ credited amount, i.e. the actual cost per 1 USD

officialCostRatio.desc: Actual cost as a percentage of the official price

inputOutput.desc: Input = what you send to the model; output = the model reply. Output is usually more expensive

cacheWriteRead.desc: Write = storing reusable content; read = reusing content. Reads are cheaper

tokens.desc: Billing usage unit, about one million text pieces

forward.one: Enter recharge amount, credited amount and group rate
forward.two: Convert recharge ratio and 1:1 equivalent rate
forward.three: Compare against official cost, view the price table

reverse.one: Pick a reference model and enter actual paid prices
reverse.two: Infer the real group rate and equivalent rate
reverse.three: Decide if it is cheaper / pricier / on par with official

forwardCalc.groupRateHint: Billing multiplier the platform sets for a model group

conclusion.title: Conclusion
conclusion.empty: Fill in recharge amount, credited amount, group rate and exchange rate to see the conclusion
conclusion.tableHint: The price table compares each model paid ¥ vs official ¥ line by line.

exchange.networkDisclosure: Fetching connects to a public third-party rate service (open.er-api.com, with jsDelivr fallback). No form inputs are sent.
exchange.fetchFailed: The live rate could not be fetched. The local reference rate is still in use.

priceTable.title: Price table · Paid ¥ comparison
priceTable.fillHint: Fill the inputs above to show paid prices

reverseResult.notApplicable: This model has no such item; not applicable
reverseResult.selectModelHint: Select a reference model and fill in paid prices to see the inferred result
reverseResult.fillPaidHint: Fill in at least one paid price (input / output / cache)

errorBoundary.title: Error
errorBoundary.description: The app hit an unexpected error. Try resetting to continue.
